name: Raspberry Spoom
recipeIngredient: 225 g fresh raspberries, plus extra to serve
recipeInstructions:
1. In a pan, combine 115g caster sugar with 300ml water, lime rind, and juice. Bring mixture to a boil. Allow it to cool before discarding the mint.
2. Process raspberries and wine in a food processor or blender until a purée is formed. Stir this into the lime mixture. Place the mixture in a freezer-safe container and freeze until solid.
3. Remove sorbet from the freezer and break up ice crystals with a fork. Whisk egg whites until stiff, then gradually whisk in remaining sugar until thick and glossy. Fold this into the sorbet and beat until well mixed. Serve immediately, topped with extra raspberries and 1 tablespoon raspberry liqueur per serving. Decorate with geranium leaves.
To freeze: Freeze at the end of stage 2 for up to 3 months.
